---
title: "3D Pointclouds in Sketchfab"
id: activity-gis-reproducible-research-external-1
order: 303
summary: "3D Pointclouds in Sketchfab."
modules:
  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
materials: []
assessments: []
labels:
  - supplement
  - recommended
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/activity-gis-reproducible-research-external-1.md"
---

Sketchfab is a provider for 3D web hosting. It is easy to use: upload a point cloud and follow the settings workflow.

Example model:

<https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/gisselberger-spannweite-c38b78f3c0b04102abe46f92cb5c4fd9>

## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
